# Experiment naming system

## Canonical experiment code

```text
EXP-[YYYYMMDD]-[PLATFORM]-[SURFACE]-[FAMILY.SPECIES]-[METHOD]-[VARIANTSET]
```

Example:

```text
EXP-20260421-YTS-SHRT-ATT.PRIM-M-MPT-FRAME5
```

Meaning:

```text
EXP = experiment
20260421 = date
YTS = YouTube Shorts
SHRT = Shorts feed
ATT.PRIM = attention / first-frame salience
M-MPT = matched-pair test
FRAME5 = five first-frame variants
```

## Batch code

```text
BATCH-[YYYYMM]-[THEME]-[SEQUENCE]
```

Example:

```text
BATCH-202604-FIRSTFRAME-01
```

## Video asset code

```text
VID-[YYYYMMDD]-[PLATFORM]-[FORM]-[SERIES]-[SEQUENCE]
```

Example:

```text
VID-20260421-IGR-SCR-RETENTIONCLINIC-003
```

## Variant code

```text
V-[LETTER]-[FACTORLEVEL]
```

Examples:

```text
V-A-FACEOPEN
V-B-BEFOREAFTER
V-C-PROOFSCREEN
```

## Dataset code

```text
DATA-[YYYYMMDD]-[PLATFORM]-[BATCH]-[READOUT]
```

Example:

```text
DATA-20260428-YTS-BATCH-FIRSTFRAME-7D
```
